name: Unauthorized System Time Modification
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @neu5ron
SIGMA Title: Unauthorized System Time Modification
SIGMA Description: Detect scenarios where a potentially unauthorized application or user is modifying the system time.

False positives:
- HyperV or other virtualization technologies with binary not listed in filter portion of detection

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4616 AND (NOT((("Process Name" IN('C:\Program Files\VMware\VMware Tools\vmtoolsd.exe', 'C:\Windows\System32\VBoxService.exe', 'C:\Windows\System32\oobe\msoobe.exe')) OR ("Process Name"='C:\Windows\System32\svchost.exe' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-19%')))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Unauthorized System Time Modification on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4616 AND (NOT((("Process Name" IN('C:\Program Files\VMware\VMware Tools\vmtoolsd.exe', 'C:\Windows\System32\VBoxService.exe', 'C:\Windows\System32\oobe\msoobe.exe')) OR ("Process Name"='C:\Windows\System32\svchost.exe' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-19%')))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Unauthorized System Time Modification
